Recording.description:
Simplified representation of a Zoom cloud recording.

Certain tasks track recordings explicitly in initial_state. The real Zoom API
exposes additional structure, but AutomationBench only models fields that are
referenced in assertions.

meeting_id.description: Identifier of the meeting or webinar this recording belongs to
meeting_id.title: Meeting Id

topic.description: Title of the meeting or webinar that was recorded
topic.title: Topic

recording_url.description: Direct URL to view the recording
recording_url.title: Recording Url

download_url.description: URL for downloading the recording file
download_url.title: Download Url

share_url.description: Publicly shareable link for the recording
share_url.title: Share Url

file_type.description: Format of the recording file, e.g. MP4 or M4A
file_type.title: File Type

recording_start.description: ISO 8601 timestamp indicating when the recording began
recording_start.title: Recording Start

Recording.title: Recording
